runs.note: Fixed tenant isolation by adding tenantId filtering to all endpoints, implemented role-based field authorization for updates and visibility, restricted delete permissions to project_manager and admin roles, and ensured error opacity by returning 'Not found' for unauthorized access to prevent information disclosure about cross-tenant resources.

runs.note: Fixed tenant isolation by adding tenantId checks to all endpoints. Implemented role-based field authorization for updates (developer: status only, project_manager: name/description/status, admin: all fields including billingCode). Added role-based visibility for billingCode field. Added delete authorization (project_manager and admin only). All cross-tenant access now returns 'Not found' errors for security.
